distance_km.note: Search results confirm La Savoyarde Marathon offers races including a 42km distance in both skate and classic techniques

elevation_m.note: Search results do not provide elevation gain information for the race course

country.note: Multiple sources confirm La Savoyarde takes place in France, specifically in La Féclaz, Savoie

region.note: Search results confirm the race is located in the French Alps, specifically on the Savoie Grand Revard Plateau

discipline.note: Search results explicitly state the race offers both skate and classic techniques. The 42km race is available in skate technique, and a 21km classic race is also offered

typical_participants.note: Search results do not provide information about typical number of participants

year_founded.note: Search results describe La Savoyarde as a 'legendary race' and 'emblematic' event but do not specify the founding year or first edition date

official_website.note: Search results do not confirm the provided URL. Results reference other domains (skiclassics.com, milesrepublic.com, auvergnerhonealpes-tourisme.com) but not lasavoyardeorganisation.com

typical_race_date.note: Search results confirm La Savoyarde takes place on the first Sunday in February. The 2026 edition is scheduled for Sunday, February 1st, 2026
